addon_options.name: 360° Leadership Assessment
addon_options.description: Individual 360° feedback report with debrief for each participant.

addon_options.name: Extra 1:1 Coaching Sessions (3-Pack)
addon_options.description: Three additional 60-minute individual coaching sessions per participant.

addon_options.name: On-Demand Microlearning Library (6 Months)
addon_options.description: Six months of access to our leadership microlearning video library.

addon_options.name: Printed Participant Workbooks
addon_options.description: Professionally printed, bound workbooks shipped to your office.

addon_options.name: Post-Program Impact Survey & Report
addon_options.description: Custom impact survey with executive-ready insights and recommendations.

case_studies.title: Scaling Senior Leadership in a High-Growth SaaS Company
case_studies.summary: How a rapidly growing SaaS company prepared its senior leaders to scale culture and execution across regions.
case_studies.challenge: Senior leaders were promoted rapidly without a shared leadership framework, leading to inconsistent decision-making and burnout.
case_studies.solution: Designed a blended leadership academy with 3 in-person intensives, executive coaching, and peer learning circles over 6 months.
case_studies.results: Decision cycle time dropped by 28%, senior leader engagement scores rose by 18 points, and voluntary turnover decreased by 12%.

case_studies.title: Transforming Executive Collaboration at a Global Tech Enterprise
case_studies.summary: Executive team alignment program that improved cross-functional collaboration in a 60,000-employee technology firm.
case_studies.challenge: The executive committee operated in silos, slowing product launches and creating competing priorities across business units.
case_studies.solution: Delivered a custom 9-month executive journey featuring strategy offsites, facilitated dialogue sessions, and inclusive leadership labs.
case_studies.results: Time-to-market for key initiatives improved by 22%, and executive team trust scores increased from the 38th to the 76th percentile.

case_studies.title: Building Coaching Skills for Nurse Managers
case_studies.summary: A coaching skills program that empowered nurse managers to lead more engaged, resilient teams.
case_studies.challenge: Nurse managers were promoted for clinical expertise but lacked confidence in coaching and feedback conversations.
case_studies.solution: Rolled out a 3-month blended program with live workshops, practice labs, and manager toolkits focused on real clinical scenarios.
case_studies.results: Employee engagement improved by 11 points on units with trained managers; patient satisfaction scores rose by 7%.

case_studies.title: Preparing Emerging Leaders for First-Time Manager Roles
case_studies.summary: How a financial services firm built a pipeline of ready-now first-line leaders.
case_studies.challenge: High-performing individual contributors were struggling to manage hybrid teams and balance performance with well-being.
case_studies.solution: Launched a 10-week virtual cohort program combining self-paced modules with facilitator-led group coaching.
case_studies.results: Internal fill rate for manager roles increased from 48% to 71% within one year, and time-to-productivity decreased by 30%.

case_studies.title: Leading Through Plant Consolidations in Manufacturing
case_studies.summary: Change management program that enabled leaders to guide teams through major operational shifts.
case_studies.challenge: Upcoming plant closures and consolidations were creating uncertainty and resistance across the workforce.
case_studies.solution: Delivered a series of targeted change leadership workshops and one-on-one coaching for site leaders.
case_studies.results: Retention of critical talent exceeded targets by 15%, and safety incidents decreased despite major transitions.

case_studies.title: Embedding Inclusive Leadership in Retail Store Operations
case_studies.summary: An inclusive leadership initiative that improved culture and customer experience across 800+ stores.
case_studies.challenge: Customer complaints and internal surveys highlighted inconsistent experiences for diverse employees and customers.
case_studies.solution: Implemented an inclusive leadership curriculum for store leaders and regional managers, supported by toolkits and nudges.
case_studies.results: Inclusion scores increased by 13 points, and customer satisfaction among underrepresented segments improved by 9%.

case_studies.title: Leading Distributed Engineering Teams Across Time Zones
case_studies.summary: Helping engineering managers lead remote-first teams with clarity and connection.
case_studies.challenge: Rapid shift to remote work led to misalignment, Zoom fatigue, and uneven performance across geographically dispersed teams.
case_studies.solution: Delivered a cohort-based virtual leadership program focused on asynchronous collaboration and outcome-based management.
case_studies.results: Time lost to miscommunication dropped by 21%, and engagement for remote engineers rose by 10 points.

case_studies.title: Navigating Policy Change in a Public Sector Agency
case_studies.summary: Change leadership training for managers delivering new digital services to citizens.
case_studies.challenge: A major policy shift required new digital processes, but managers lacked change leadership skills.
case_studies.solution: Designed a multi-cohort program with workshops, peer coaching, and change project clinics.
case_studies.results: On-time delivery of digital initiatives improved from 62% to 89%, with higher citizen satisfaction scores.

case_studies.title: Executive Coaching for Partners in a Professional Services Firm
case_studies.summary: Targeted executive coaching to support new practice leaders in a global consulting firm.
case_studies.challenge: Newly promoted partners needed to grow practices while leading diverse, global teams.
case_studies.solution: Matched 40 partners with seasoned executive coaches for 9-month engagements aligned to firm priorities.
case_studies.results: Coached partners outperformed peers by 19% on revenue growth and 14% on team engagement.

case_studies.title: Strengthening Safety Leadership in Energy Operations
case_studies.summary: Leadership program for field supervisors focused on safety culture and accountability.
case_studies.challenge: Inconsistent safety practices and near-miss incidents signaled a need for stronger front-line leadership.
case_studies.solution: Deployed scenario-based workshops and on-the-job coaching to build shared safety leadership standards.
case_studies.results: Recordable incidents declined by 26% within 12 months, and safety climate scores improved significantly.

case_studies.title: Developing Team Leads in a Global Logistics Network
case_studies.summary: Creating a consistent leadership approach for frontline team leads across hubs.
case_studies.challenge: Team leads had no formal leadership training, resulting in uneven performance and engagement across sites.
case_studies.solution: Implemented a modular learning path combining self-paced content with local facilitation.
case_studies.results: On-time delivery metrics improved by 9%, and frontline turnover dropped by 8%.

case_studies.title: Inclusive Leadership for Product and Design Leaders
case_studies.summary: Helping product and design leaders embed inclusion into decision-making and innovation.
case_studies.challenge: Product decisions lacked diverse perspectives, leading to missed opportunities and customer complaints.
case_studies.solution: Delivered inclusive leadership sprints integrated into existing product rituals and roadmapping cycles.
case_studies.results: Diversity of beta user groups increased by 35%, and NPS improved by 6 points among key customer segments.

coaches.headline: Executive Leadership Coach
coaches.bio: Emma specializes in helping senior technology and product leaders navigate hyper-growth, drive alignment, and build inclusive cultures. With a background as a former VP of Product, she blends real-world experience with pragmatic coaching.

coaches.headline: Executive Coach & Former CHRO
coaches.bio: David partners with C-suite and senior HR leaders on culture, succession, and high-stakes transitions. He has over two decades of experience in global financial services and professional services firms.

coaches.headline: Executive & Inclusive Leadership Coach
coaches.bio: Linda supports executives and senior leaders as they build inclusive, high-performing organizations. She has coached leaders across technology, healthcare, and NGOs on influence, stakeholder management, and inclusive leadership.

coaches.headline: Leadership & Team Dynamics Coach
coaches.bio: Samir helps mid-level and senior leaders lead through change and complexity, with a focus on cross-cultural collaboration and virtual teams.

coaches.headline: Emerging Leader & Manager Coach
coaches.bio: Amélie works with new and emerging leaders to build confidence in communication, delegation, and feedback—especially in hybrid environments.

coaches.headline: Senior Leadership & Change Coach
coaches.bio: Michael brings deep experience in large-scale transformation and works with senior leaders to align strategy, structure, and culture.

coaches.headline: Leadership Coach for Remote Teams
coaches.bio: Sophia coaches leaders of distributed and hybrid teams on communication, psychological safety, and performance.

coaches.headline: Executive Coach & Strategy Advisor
coaches.bio: Kenji partners with technology and manufacturing executives in Asia-Pacific to sharpen strategic thinking and stakeholder influence.

coaches.headline: Inclusive Leadership & Culture Coach
coaches.bio: Grace focuses on inclusive leadership, helping senior leaders create cultures where diverse talent can thrive.

coaches.headline: Leadership Coach for Mid-Level Managers
coaches.bio: Liam helps mid-level leaders step into broader roles, with a focus on coaching skills and performance conversations.

programs.title: Essential Leadership Foundations – 2-Day In-Person
programs.subtitle: Core leadership skills for new and emerging managers
programs.description: A practical 2-day in-person workshop covering goal-setting, feedback, coaching basics, and leading hybrid teams.

programs.title: Advanced Strategic Leadership Intensive – 2-Day In-Person
programs.subtitle: Strategic thinking and influence for experienced managers
programs.description: An immersive 2-day workshop for experienced leaders who need to sharpen strategic thinking, stakeholder influence, and cross-functional collaboration.

programs.title: Transformational Leadership Bootcamp – 2-Day In-Person
programs.subtitle: Leading large-scale change across your organization
programs.description: A high-intensity 2-day bootcamp for senior leaders driving complex transformations.

programs.title: Leadership Communication Lab – 1-Day Workshop
programs.subtitle: Communicate with clarity, confidence, and impact
programs.description: A live, virtual communication intensive where leaders practice real conversations: giving feedback, leading meetings, and framing change.

programs.title: Leading Through Change – Change Management Workshop
programs.subtitle: Give your managers a practical toolkit for leading change
programs.description: A two-day virtual workshop for managers who need to lead their teams through ongoing change with clarity and empathy.

programs.title: Inclusive Leadership in Action – 1.5-Day Workshop
programs.subtitle: Turn inclusive leadership principles into everyday habits
programs.description: An interactive in-person workshop for leaders who want to build psychologically safe, inclusive teams.

programs.title: Coaching Skills for People Managers – 1-Day In-Person
programs.subtitle: Make coaching a daily leadership habit
programs.description: A hands-on workshop that helps managers shift from telling to coaching through practice, feedback, and simple tools.

programs.title: Leading Remote & Hybrid Teams – Virtual Workshop
programs.subtitle: Build connection and accountability across distance
programs.description: A live virtual workshop on setting norms, running effective remote meetings, and sustaining engagement in hybrid teams.

programs.title: Coaching Skills for New Managers – Live Webinar
programs.subtitle: A free, 60-minute introduction to everyday coaching
programs.description: Learn a simple coaching framework you can use in one-on-ones, project check-ins, and performance conversations.

programs.title: Advanced Coaching Conversations – Live Webinar
programs.subtitle: Go deeper with coaching for experienced people leaders
programs.description: Dig into real scenarios and learn how to coach through resistance, ambiguity, and underperformance.

programs.title: Communicating Change with Clarity – Live Webinar
programs.subtitle: Craft messages that build trust in times of change
programs.description: A 75-minute session on how to communicate change in ways that reduce anxiety and build buy-in.

programs.title: Self-Paced Leadership Essentials (8-Hour Course)
programs.subtitle: Foundational leadership skills you can complete at your own pace
programs.description: An on-demand course covering mindset, communication, coaching basics, and managing remote work—designed for new leaders.

programs.title: Self-Paced Strategic Leadership Mastery (10-Hour Course)
programs.subtitle: Deepen your strategic impact—in your own time
programs.description: A comprehensive self-paced program for experienced managers who want to think more strategically and lead beyond their function.

programs.title: Comprehensive Leadership Certificate (14-Hour Course)
programs.subtitle: A deep-dive leadership pathway for high-potential managers
programs.description: A longer-form self-paced experience that covers the full spectrum from self-leadership to enterprise thinking.

programs.title: Inclusive Leadership Essentials (6-Hour Self-Paced Course)
programs.subtitle: Build everyday habits that foster inclusion and belonging
programs.description: A practical, scenario-based course to help leaders recognize bias, foster psychological safety, and design more inclusive team practices.
